mapper.sql: b.binding_id, b.user_id, b.channel_id, b.bind_time, b.unbind_time, b.status, b.unbind_reason, b.operator_id, b.create_by, b.create_time, b.update_by, b.update_time, b.remark, b.del_flag
b.binding_id, b.channel_id, c.channel_name, c.channel_type, b.bind_time, b.unbind_time, b.status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM jst_student_channel_binding b LEFT JOIN jst_channel c ON c.channel_id = b.channel_id AND c.del_flag = '0' WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND b.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY b.bind_time DESC, b.binding_id DESC
SELECT FROM jst_student_channel_binding b LEFT JOIN jst_channel c ON c.channel_id = b.channel_id AND c.del_flag = '0' WHERE b.binding_id = #{bindingId} AND b.del_flag = '0'
SELECT FROM jst_student_channel_binding b WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND b.status = 'active' AND b.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY b.binding_id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM jst_student_channel_binding b WHERE b.binding_id = #{bindingId} AND b.del_flag = '0'

SELECT channel_id, user_id, channel_type, channel_name, contact_mobile, auth_status, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag FROM jst_channel WHERE channel_id = #{channelId} AND status = 1 AND auth_status = 'approved' AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: UPDATE jst_student_channel_binding SET status = #{newStatus}, unbind_time = NOW(), unbind_reason = #{unbindReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operator_id = #{operatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE binding_id = #{bindingId} AND status = #{expectedStatus} AND del_flag = '0'
UPDATE jst_user SET bound_channel_id = #{boundChannelId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = '0'
